plans.title: Choose the plan that fits your needs.
plans.subtitle: Start for free and upgrade anytime.
plans.changePlanAnytime: You can change your plan at any time.

signUp.title: Create account
signUp.subtitle: Start your engine diagnostics journey
signUp.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
signUp.acceptRequired: Please accept the Terms and Privacy Policy to continue
signUp.acceptTerms: I accept the Terms and Conditions
signUp.allowAiTraining: I agree to anonymously share my engine recordings to improve MotorEcho AI
signUp.nameRequired: First name and last name are required

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link
forgotPassword.emailSent: We sent you a password reset link. Check your inbox.

payment.title: Complete your subscription
payment.subtitle: Secure payment powered by Stripe
payment.securityNote: Your payment is secured with 256-bit SSL encryption. No payment data is stored on our servers.
payment.demoNotice: Demo mode: Any card details will activate your subscription.

beta.title: Internal beta
beta.subtitle: Premium payment is disabled during internal testing.
beta.banner: Internal beta mode — no real payment will be processed.
beta.note: Premium access is automatically enabled for all accounts during this internal beta. Purchases will be available in the public release.

success.title: Payment successful!
success.subtitle: Welcome to {{plan}}. Setting up your account...

vehicleSetup.title: Add Your Vehicle
vehicleSetup.subtitle: Tell us about your car so AI can provide accurate diagnostics
vehicleSetup.brandLoadError: Unable to load brands. Check your connection.
vehicleSetup.errorSaving: Failed to save vehicle. Please try again.
vehicleSetup.notAuthenticated: No authenticated session — please log in again.

dashboard.noAnalysesSubtitle: Record your engine to get your first AI diagnosis

upgradeBanner.title: Upgrade to Premium
upgradeBanner.subtitle: Unlimited analyses, advanced diagnostics, PDF export

analyze.title: Analyze my engine
analyze.step1Desc: Access the engine compartment for clear audio capture
analyze.step2Desc: Hold the microphone 10-15 cm from the engine block
analyze.step3Desc: Stay silent during recording to prevent interference
analyze.step4Desc: Let the engine idle naturally for optimal analysis

recording.title: Record Engine Sound
recording.subtitle: Tap the button to start recording
recording.permissionRequired: Microphone permission is required to record engine sound.
recording.permissionDeniedSettings: Microphone denied. Enable microphone access in Android settings for MotorEcho / Expo Go.
recording.failedToStart: Failed to start recording. Please try again.
recording.previewSubtitle: Listen to the recording or start a new capture
recording.previewFailed: Unable to play the recording. You can start over.
recording.notAuthenticated: Session expired. Sign in again and re-record.
recording.interrupted: Recording interrupted. You can start again when ready.
recording.noVehicle: Add a vehicle before running an analysis.
recording.permissionBlockedBody: MotorEcho needs the microphone to analyze engine sound. Allow access in your phone settings.

checklist.phoneNear: Phone about 30 cm from the engine
checklist.quietPlace: Turn off the radio and reduce ambient noise

safety.stationary: Analysis only when stationary — never while driving
safety.parkingBrake: Engage the parking brake before starting
safety.notWhileDriving: Never use the phone under the hood while driving
safety.avoidMovingParts: Keep the phone away from belts, fans, and moving parts

summary.title: Recording quality
summary.disclaimer: This score reflects recording quality, not mechanical diagnostic certainty.

advice.batteryLow: Low battery. Plug in your phone to avoid interruption.
advice.bluetoothHeadset: For better quality, use the phone microphone directly.
advice.rerecordRecommendation: We recommend re-recording to improve diagnostic accuracy.

issues.silence: Little sound detected. Make sure the engine is running.
issues.clipping: Microphone saturated. Move your phone slightly farther away.

processing.title: AI Analysis in Progress
processing.analysisInterrupted: Analysis was interrupted. Please try again with a clear engine recording.
processing.missingAudio: No audio file to analyze. Please record again.
processing.notAuthenticated: Session expired. Sign in again and retry.

result.betaBanner: Beta — MotorEcho AI is improving thanks to community contributions
result.simulatedBanner: Simulated beta result — audio is saved, advanced AI analysis coming soon
result.saveFailedBanner: Report available locally — cloud save failed. History may not include this analysis.

healthy.title: Healthy
healthy.description: Engine sounds healthy and within normal acoustic parameters.

monitor.title: Monitor
monitor.description: Some irregular sounds detected. Monitor closely over the next week.

critical.title: Critical
critical.description: Significant anomaly detected. Immediate attention recommended.

access.lockedDescription: Upgrade to Premium to see the exact issue name, audio symptoms, estimated costs and detailed advice.
access.mechanicNotesPlaceholder: Reserved field — workshop notes coming soon

report.healthGoodHint: The engine sound profile is consistent with normal operation.
report.healthHint: We recommend monitoring to confirm how the symptom evolves.
report.confidenceNote: This score reflects how closely your recording matches our engine diagnostic database.
report.costHint: Indicative range based on partner garages and vehicle brand.
report.repairTimeHint: Estimated workshop time, excluding additional diagnostics.
report.premiumPreviewHint: Premium unlocks detailed analysis, costs, and personalized advice.

reportTiers.lockedGarageDescription: Upgrade to Garage Pro for workshop sections, mechanic notes and professional PDF reports.

history.title: History
history.upgradeForComplete: Upgrade to Premium for complete history

garage.title: Garage
garage.noVehiclesSubtitle: Add your first vehicle to start tracking engine health.
garage.communityTagline: Together, we are building the world's first AI engine sound database.

very_high.headline: Very high confidence
very_high.text: The sound signature strongly matches this hypothesis. Your recording's acoustic characteristics align clearly.

high.headline: High confidence
high.text: The detection confidence is high. The acoustic analysis is consistent with this type of symptom.

medium.headline: Medium confidence
medium.text: The selected hypothesis is plausible, but other causes remain possible. A workshop check will confirm.

low.headline: Low confidence
low.text: Several causes remain possible. We recommend having a professional confirm this diagnosis.

normal.headline: Normal use
normal.detail: You can continue using your vehicle normally while monitoring any change in the sound.

short_trips.headline: Short trips only
short_trips.detail: You may drive short distances only. Avoid long trips and hard acceleration.

avoid_prolonged.headline: Limited use
avoid_prolonged.detail: We recommend avoiding prolonged use. Schedule a workshop inspection soon.

stop_use.headline: Stop driving advised
stop_use.detail: We recommend not using your vehicle until a professional inspection.

very_low.label: Very low
very_low.text: No urgent action is needed. Keep driving as usual while staying observant.

low.label: Low
low.text: Monitor how the symptom evolves. A check can be planned without immediate urgency.

medium.label: Medium
medium.text: A check within a few days is advised to prevent progressive wear.

high.label: High
high.text: We recommend visiting a workshop soon to limit mechanical risks.

critical.label: Critical
critical.text: Prompt intervention is strongly advised. Avoid stressing the engine unnecessarily.

diagnosisNormal.lead: Your recording does not show a concerning sound pattern at this time.
diagnosisNormal.followUp: The engine appears to operate within typical acoustic parameters. Keep monitoring its behaviour.

turbo_issue.lead: We detected a sound consistent with a turbocharger / boost system anomaly.
turbo_issue.followUp: This estimate is based on your recording's acoustic characteristics and does not replace an on-vehicle mechanical diagnosis.

engine_knocking.lead: We detected a sound that may indicate engine knocking under load or acceleration.
engine_knocking.followUp: This type of sound signature deserves attention. A workshop check will confirm the source.

timing_chain_noise.lead: We detected a sound that may relate to the timing chain or belt.
timing_chain_noise.followUp: This hypothesis is based on the acoustic analysis of your engine recording.

injector_noise.lead: We detected a sound that may come from the injection system.
injector_noise.followUp: A targeted injection check will confirm or rule out this hypothesis.

idle_instability.lead: We detected an irregular sound at idle.
idle_instability.followUp: This symptom can have several causes. A workshop diagnosis will pinpoint the exact source.

turbo.lead: We detected a sound consistent with a boost system anomaly.
turbo.followUp: This estimate is based on the acoustic analysis of your recording.

engine.lead: We detected a sound that may indicate an engine-related anomaly.
engine.followUp: A mechanical check will confirm this hypothesis.

injection.lead: We detected a sound that may come from the injection or fuel system.
injection.followUp: This acoustic analysis points toward a targeted workshop verification.

distribution.lead: We detected a sound that may relate to the timing / distribution system.
distribution.followUp: This type of noise should be checked by a professional.

diagnosisFallback.lead: We detected an atypical sound compared with normal engine operation.
diagnosisFallback.followUp: This estimate is based on the acoustic characteristics of your recording.

explainer.risksIntro: In some cases — without certainty — observed symptoms may lead to:

riskItems.costlyRepair: More costly repairs if the symptom persists

garageByIssue.turbo_issue: We advise a targeted check of the turbocharger and its hoses.
garageByIssue.engine_knocking: We advise checking ignition, boost pressure and fuel quality.
garageByIssue.timing_chain_noise: We advise inspecting timing chain / belt tension and wear.
garageByIssue.injector_noise: We advise checking the injection system and injectors.
garageByIssue.idle_instability: We advise diagnosing idle behaviour and fuel systems.

garageByCategory.turbo: We advise a targeted check of the boost system.
garageByCategory.engine: We advise a full engine diagnosis at a workshop.
garageByCategory.injection: We advise checking the injection system.
garageByCategory.distribution: We advise inspecting the timing / distribution system.

explainer.garageFallback: We advise having this symptom checked by a professional.
explainer.garageFootnote: This recommendation will help the workshop save time during diagnosis.

repair.unknownCost: Repair cost will depend on the confirmed mechanical diagnosis.
repair.disclaimer: Indicative estimate — final quote will be set by the workshop after inspection.

vehicleHealth.analysisReminder: We recommend a new analysis to track how your vehicle is evolving.
vehicleHealth.noAnalysesYet: No analyses for this vehicle yet.

evolution.unknown: Not enough analyses to measure trend yet.

excellent.title: Excellent
excellent.description: The sound profile is reassuring. Keep up regular checks.

good.title: Good condition
good.description: Your vehicle shows an overall healthy sound profile.

watch.title: Monitor
watch.description: Some signals deserve attention. A follow-up analysis is advised.

advised.title: Service advised
advised.description: Recurring anomalies suggest a workshop check soon.

urgent.title: Urgent attention
urgent.description: Detected signals warrant a prompt professional inspection.

unlimitedAnalyses.title: Unlimited Analyses
unlimitedAnalyses.description: Run as many AI diagnostics as you want with no monthly cap.

advancedReports.title: Advanced AI Reports
advancedReports.description: Detailed frequency breakdowns, spectral analysis, and comparison charts.

completeHistory.title: Complete History
completeHistory.description: Access your full analysis history with advanced search and filtering.

vehicleTracking.title: Vehicle Tracking
vehicleTracking.description: Track health trends across multiple vehicles over time.

priorityAnalysis.title: Priority Analysis
priorityAnalysis.description: Your analysis requests are processed first in our AI queue.

pdfExport.title: PDF Export
pdfExport.description: Export professional diagnostic reports to share with your mechanic.

purchase.noOfferings: Subscriptions are unavailable right now. Please try again later.
purchase.noPackage: This plan is not available for the selected billing cycle.
purchase.failed: Purchase failed. Check your connection and try again.
purchase.networkError: Unable to load subscription prices. Check your network connection.
purchase.betaUnavailable: Premium purchases are temporarily unavailable during the internal beta. Your Free plan remains fully active.
purchase.betaPremiumActive: Internal beta — Premium access is automatically enabled for all signed-in accounts. This screen is informational only; purchases are disabled until the public release.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.aiTrainingLabel: Allow anonymous use of my recordings
privacy.aiTrainingDescription: Your data is anonymized. No personal information is used.

limits.upgradeToPremium: Upgrade to Premium to manage up to 2 vehicles.
limits.upgradeToGarage: Upgrade to Garage to manage unlimited vehicles.
limits.monthlyLimitReached: Your monthly limit has been reached.

slide1.title: Listen to your engine
slide1.subtitle: Record your engine sound and let AI analyze it for anomalies before they become costly failures.

slide2.title: Instant AI analysis
slide2.subtitle: Our neural engine processes frequencies in real-time to detect turbo, injector, timing chain, and knock issues.

slide3.title: Prevent costly repairs
slide3.subtitle: Get professional-grade diagnostics at your fingertips. Monitor your engine health over time.

feedback.exitSubtitle: Your feedback helps us improve MotorEcho's accuracy.
feedback.helpUsImprove: Help us improve by confirming the result
feedback.selectIssue: Select the issue found by your mechanic
feedback.consentQuestion: Do you authorize anonymous use of your engine sound recording for AI training?
feedback.consentNote: Your data is anonymized and only used to train our engine sound model. No personal information is shared.
feedback.feedbackHelps: Your feedback helps us build a better AI for everyone.
